rulings.Case Title: CENTER FOR SELF-IMPROVEMENT AND COMMUNITY VS. LENNAR CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Motion And Motion To Bifurcate Pltf'S Prop 65 Claims For A Two-Phase Bench Trial
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, August 31, 2011, line 1, DEFENDANTS LENNAR CORPORATION, LENNAR HOMES OF CALIFORNIA INC., LENNAR-BVHP LLC, LENNAR ASSOCIATES MANAGEMENT LLC Re-Notice Of Motion To Bifurcate Plaintiff's Prop 65 Claims For A Two-Phase Bench Trial. DEFENDANTS MOTION TO BIFURCATE PLAINTIFF'S PROP 65 CLAIMS FOR A TWO PHASE TRIAL IS DENIED. THE SUPPORTING EVIDENCE IN THE PROP 65 CLAIMS AND TORT CLAIMS OVERLAP. ANY POSSIBLE PREJUDICE CAN BE RESOLVED THROUGH JURY INSTRUCTIONS. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: MATTHEW ORLANDO VS. SUPPERCLUB SAN FRANCISCO, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, August 31, 2011, line 2, DEFENDANT SUPPERCLUB SAN FRANCISCO, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON THE PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIM FOR RELIEF IS GRANTED. THE EVIDENCE SHOWS THAT DEFENDANT HAD NO ADVANCED KNOWLEDGE OF WU'S UNFITNESS. MOREOVER DEFENDANT REFUSED TO APPROVE OR RATIFY WU'S CONDUCT BY IMMEDIATELY TERMINATING HIM. FINALLY, THERE IS NO EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY PLAINTIFF THAT SHOW'S THAT DEFENDANT WAS PERSONALLY GUILTY OF OPPRESSION, FRAUD OR MALICE. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: LINDA CLEM VS. EMCARE, INC., A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, August 31, 2011, line 8, DEFENDANT RUSSELL BRAUN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT DR. BRAUN'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 1ST-3RD AND 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION. ALLEGATIONS IN THE COMPLAINT INDICATE THAT PLAINTIFF ENTERED INTO AN EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENT WITH EMCARE AND THAT EMCARE WAS HER EMPLOYER. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO CITE TO ANY FACTS SHOWING HOW DR. BRAUN ALSO BECAME HER EMPLOYER. THE DEMURRER TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS MOOT. PLAINTIFF ADMITS THAT THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS ONLY AGAINST EMCARE. THE DEMURRER TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT ALLEGE A BASIS FOR RESTITUTION OR INJUNCTIVE RELIEF AGAINST DR. BROWN. MADRID V. PEROT SYSTEMS CORP. (2005) 130 CAL.APP.4TH 440, 452. =(302/LMG)
